settings.heading: Types of Trophies: Materials & Styles Guide
settings.subheading: Crystal, metal, acrylic, glass, fibre and wood — the main trophy types in India, how they differ, and which suits your event and budget. A practical guide by Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: The main trophy types in India are crystal, metal, acrylic, glass, fibre and wooden. Crystal is most premium; metal cups are the classic sports look; acrylic and fibre are budget and lightweight; wood is warm and eco-friendly. Meru Trophy makes them all. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The main trophy materials
settings.text:
• Crystal (K9 optical): most premium; corporate, leadership and milestone awards.
  • Metal cups: the classic winner's look; sports tournaments and championships.
  • Acrylic: light, affordable, full-colour UV printing; corporate and bulk events.
  • Glass: elegant and clearer than acrylic, cheaper than crystal.
  • Fibre: tall, light and cheapest; school sports days and local tournaments.
  • Wood: warm, eco-friendly; felicitations, retirements and mementos.

settings.heading: How to choose
settings.text: Match the material to the occasion and budget: premium crystal for senior recognition, metal cups for sports, acrylic/fibre for volume and budget, wood for felicitations. For high-volume or shipped events, lighter materials cost less to send. Not sure? Tell us the event and we'll recommend.

settings.question: Which trophy material is best?
settings.answer: It depends on the occasion: crystal for premium recognition, metal for sports, acrylic/fibre for budget volume, wood for felicitations.

settings.question: What's the most affordable trophy type?
settings.answer: Fibre trophies are the cheapest, followed by acrylic; both look great with engraving.

settings.question: What's the most premium?
settings.answer: Optical crystal (K9) — the standard for corporate and leadership awards.

settings.question: Can you make all these types?
settings.answer: Yes — Meru Trophy manufactures crystal, metal, acrylic, glass, fibre and wood in-house.

settings.heading: Not sure which type?
settings.text: Tell us what you're planning — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
